item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: 1 million seconds is 12 days - 1 BILLION seconds is 31.7 years. I guess we're speed-running to Mad Max conditions? See ya on the wasteland...
item.description: A data center operated by QTS in Fayette County, Georgia consumed nearly 30 million gallons of water that went unbilled — through connections that weren't being properly monitored during a transition to a new smart meter system. The unbilled usage went undetected for somewhere between four months and over a year, with the county and QTS disagreeing on the exact duration. The excess usage occurred while drought conditions prompted officials to ask residents to restrict lawn watering. QTS eventually paid around $150,000 but faced no penalties. The county called it a "procedural mix-up" and declined to fine its largest customer. The case reflects a broader concern: roughly two-thirds of data centers built or under development since 2022 are located in water-stressed areas, according to Bloomberg. In Phoenix alone, data center water consumption is projected to jump from 385 million gallons per year to 3.7 billion once all planned facilities come online.
item.dc:creator: pixelpatron

item.title: Great Hammerhead Sharks swim sideways so their big dorsal fins acts like a foil, providing lift and requiring less energy to swim
item.description: This large Great Hammerhead Shark was swimming close to shore by Clearwater, Florida this morning. I've been seeing more Hammerheads in the Clearwater / St Pete area this year than I have for at least a decade. I've seen one every day for the last week or so. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, BlueSky, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.description: Since the mid-1980s, bright orange Garfield-shaped novelty telephones and their parts have washed up regularly on the beaches of Brittany’s Iroise coast in France. For more than 30 years, no one knew where they came from. In 2019, volunteers from the Ar Viltansoù environmental group solved the mystery: a shipping container lost during a storm in the early 1980s had become wedged inside a sea cave accessible only at low tide. The container broke open over time, slowly releasing the plastic phones with each tide. The Garfield phones, popular in the 1980s, were cargo in a container that was lost from a ship in rough weather. The discovery highlighted ongoing plastic pollution issues, as the phones do not biodegrade...
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: Had day off. Trying to do work on computer. Panko come bug me wants my undying attention. I sit on the floor with him. He leaves ? not even two minutes. Ok. I go back to computer. Rinse repeat all day.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

26 Man Tax: Fabian Arnold
"I am Me, and I hope to become Me more and more." - Paula Modersohn-Becker So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
